text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's the Three Goddesses statue! I better say
hello today too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hello! I trained super hard today, just like always!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna do my best tomorrow too! So I'd really
appreciate it if you all watched over me!
